title: Mystery Surrounds Disappearance of Baby's Body in Corrientes
description: A woman in Corrientes, Argentina has reported her baby's body disappeared from the hospital, sparking an investigation into whether the pregnancy ever occurred.

sources.title: Dramático caso en Corrientes: denuncian la desaparición del cuerpo de un bebé en el hospital Vidal
Fabuladora en Corrientes: "Hace unos años mintió de la misma manera... y nunca estuvo embarazada"
Misterio en Corrientes: mujer denunció que su bebé desapareció, pero ahora se investiga si hubo embarazo

sections.heading: Disappearance Case
paragraphs: According to 'Perfil', a dramatic case has emerged in Corrientes where a woman has reported the disappearance of her baby's body from the Vidal hospital.

sections.heading: Investigation
paragraphs: 'Diario Primera Linea' reports that authorities are now investigating whether the woman was ever pregnant, adding a layer of mystery to the case.

sections.heading: Past Allegations
paragraphs: 'Radio Dos Corrientes' mentions that the woman has a history of making similar false claims in the past, raising questions about the credibility of her current allegations.

faq.a: A woman reported that her baby's body disappeared from the Vidal hospital in Corrientes, as reported by 'Perfil'.
Yes, 'Diario Primera Linea' states that an investigation is underway to determine if the woman was ever pregnant.

faq.q: Is there any history of similar claims by the woman?
faq.a: Yes, 'Radio Dos Corrientes' reports that the woman has made similar false claims in the past.
